channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-995] 1.8 <-> 2.1.54 ost-pools 24
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/56ef7fa4-3e74-11e1-b417-5254004bbbd3.

== ost-pools test 24: Independence of pool from other setstripe parameters == 15:05:11 (1326495911)
client-24vm3: Pool lustre.pool1 created
Updated after 0 sec: wanted '' got ''
client-24vm3: OST lustre-OST0000_UUID added to pool lustre.pool1
client-24vm3: OST lustre-OST0001_UUID added to pool lustre.pool1
client-24vm3: OST lustre-OST0002_UUID added to pool lustre.pool1
client-24vm3: OST lustre-OST0003_UUID added to pool lustre.pool1
client-24vm3: OST lustre-OST0004_UUID added to pool lustre.pool1
client-24vm3: OST lustre-OST0005_UUID added to pool lustre.pool1
client-24vm3: OST lustre-OST0006_UUID added to pool lustre.pool1
Updated after 0 sec: wanted 'lustre-OST0000_UUID lustre-OST0001_UUID lustre-OST0002_UUID lustre-OST0003_UUID lustre-OST0004_UUID lustre-OST0005_UUID lustre-OST0006_UUID ' got 'lustre-OST0000_UUID lustre-OST0001_UUID lustre-OST0002_UUID lustre-OST0003_UUID lustre-OST0004_UUID lustre-OST0005_UUID lustre-OST0006_UUID '
total: 10 creates in 0.02 seconds: 418.76 creates/second
total: 10 creates in 0.02 seconds: 476.90 creates/second
total: 10 creates in 0.02 seconds: 478.65 creates/second
total: 10 creates in 0.02 seconds: 464.49 creates/second
ost-pools test_24: @@@@@@ FAIL: Stripe count () not inherited in /mnt/lustre/d0.ost-pools/d24/dir4/f240 (1)
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2012-01-13/lustre-mixed-el6-x86_64_423_-7f9f1d11c3f8/ost-pools.test_24.*.1326495931.log
ost-pools test_24: @@@@@@ FAIL: Stripe size () not inherited in /mnt/lustre/d0.ost-pools/d24/dir4/f240 (1048576)
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2012-01-13/lustre-mixed-el6-x86_64_423_-7f9f1d11c3f8/ost-pools.test_24.*.1326495938.log
ost-pools test_24: @@@@@@ FAIL: Stripe count () not inherited in /mnt/lustre/d0.ost-pools/d24/dir4/f241 (1)
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2012-01-13/lustre-mixed-el6-x86_64_423_-7f9f1d11c3f8/ost-pools.test_24.*.1326495938.log

Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2012-01-13/lustre-mixed-el6-x86_64_423_-7f9f1d11c3f8/ost-pools.test_24.*.1326495939.log
ost-pools test_24: @@@@@@ FAIL: Stripe count () not inherited in /mnt/lustre/d0.ost-pools/d24/dir4/f242 (1)
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2012-01-13/lustre-mixed-el6-x86_64_423_-7f9f1d11c3f8/ost-pools.test_24.*.1326495940.log

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-b1_8 » i686,client,el6,inkernel #186
LU-995 utils: make lfs getstripe directory output consistent. (Revision 2e07f1f30bdde4b9263dcb3913c35dd11fa5ae3c)

Result = SUCCESS
Johann Lombardi : 2e07f1f30bdde4b9263dcb3913c35dd11fa5ae3c

  • lustre/utils/liblustreapi.c
  • lustre/include/lustre/liblustreapi.h

  • lustre/utils/lfs.c
  • lustre/tests/sanity.sh

Got the same issue on 2.2-RC1 test.
https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/e10502ba-6fe6-11e1-8464-5254004bbbd3
Not considering as a blcoker for 2.2

Lustre Clients:
Tag: 1.8.7-wc1
Distro/Arch: RHEL5/x86_64 (kernel version: 2.6.18-274.3.1.el5)
Build: http://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b1_8/171/
Network: TCP (1GigE)
ENABLE_QUOTA=yes

Lustre Servers:Tag: v2_1_1_0_RC2
Distro/Arch: RHEL5/x86_64 (kernel version: 2.6.18-274.12.1.el5_lustre.g4554b65)
Build: http://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_1/41/
Network: TCP (1GigE)

The same issue occurred: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/32ec951e-587e-11e1-a226-5254004bbbd3
the patch is tracked at http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,2117

Reopen this issue since still hit it on 1.8.7-RHEL6 client.

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == test 24: Independence of pool from other setstripe parameters == 08:41:40
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: ost-pools test_24: @@@@@@ FAIL: Stripe count (0) not inherited in /mnt/lustre/d0.ost-pools/d24/dir4/f240 (1)
LustreError: 21190:0:(ldlm_request.c:1039:ldlm_cli_cancel_req()) Got rc -108 from cancel RPC: canceling anyway
LustreError: 21190:0:(ldlm_request.c:1597:ldlm_cli_cancel_list()) ldlm_cli_cancel_list: -108
LustreError: 21190:0:(ldlm_request.c:1039:ldlm_cli_cancel_req()) Got rc -108 from cancel RPC: canceling anyway
LustreError: 21190:0:(ldlm_request.c:1597:ldlm_cli_cancel_list()) ldlm_cli_cancel_list: -108
Lustre: client ffff880112808800 umount complete
Lustre: Acceptor stopping
Lustre: Removed LNI 10.10.4.15@tcp
Lustre: Removed LNI 192.168.4.15@o2ib
[root@client-15-ib tests]# rpm -qa|grep lustre
lustre-client-1.8.7-wc1_2.6.32_131.12.1.el6.x86_64.x86_64
lustre-client-modules-1.8.7-wc1_2.6.32_131.12.1.el6.x86_64.x86_64
lustre-client-tests-1.8.7-wc1_2.6.32_131.12.1.el6.x86_64.x86_64
ok then let's close this as a duplicate and reopen if it is ever seen with 1.8.7-wc1 or later 1.8.x release

Hi Peter,

The client version mentioned in my comment 26/Jan/12 4:20 PM was 1.8.7-wc1-RHEL5 while on 30/Jan/12 5:20 PM the client version was 1.8.6-wc1-RHEL6(with the patch)

For the latest interop test between 1.8.7-wc1-RHEL6 and 2.1.55, since subtest 18 was failed and the following tests were not run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/fca92dd6-4b0e-11e1-915b-5254004bbbd3

Sarah

Was the test running against 1.8.6-wc1 or 1.8.7-wc1? If it is a duplicate of LU541 then it should not have appeared with the latter, right?

Peter
this patch should be a duplicate of LU-541

I reran the test again and here is the report: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/79a577d2-4b90-11e1-915b-5254004bbbd3
I added "res=" to the ost-pools test_24
dmsg and debug log of MDS and OST
I rerun this test and here is the report https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/310fb41a-4861-11e1-b292-5254004bbbd3. Please find the dmsg and debug log of MDS and OST in the attached.

Hi Hongchao,

I will try to grab some nodes and test it, will keep you updated.

the debug patch is at http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1987

Hi Sarah
could you please apply the debug patch and test it again? thanks in advance!

the "stripe_count" and "stripe_size" gotten from the directory(/mnt/lustre/d0.ost-pools/d24/dir4/) is null,
and the corresponding value from the files is correct(stripe_count=1, stripe_size=1048576), then it is suspected
that this issue is related to the test framework, will create a debug patch to get more info about it.

Hongchao

Could you please look into this one?

Thanks

Peter
